{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320145218252AF553E41E885958FC"}"},"total":280},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7481098604116280126","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"有一点问道红尘的味道在
而且王玲花人设也让我想起了崔慕凝？时间太久忘了
文风也是相对舒服的
节奏上感觉有点快
感觉进度有点太快了
或许是在番茄的通病
不是按订阅赚钱的
不想某点按订阅赚钱
所以前期节奏会慢甚至注水赚钱
但是个人感觉节奏还是太快了

另外就是女主数量
到目前至少五个了
在短短的这些字数里
而且前三个感情戏太明朗了
互动日常写的较少
虽然后续应该有故事塑造人物
只能说期待一下吧
 希望女主并不要很多
不要依靠每个女主的故事来多些字数
女主太多驾驭不开也容易成种马文
现在看后宫主要还是看的感情戏塑造和互动修罗场
精品超多女主自有娱乐春秋逆天邪神
但是现在看也感觉人物有点扁平
鸡叉夏花关关近几年的文笔和剧情也都更细腻
女主数量也都是有所控制

作者还是写的不错","text_exts":[{"e":263,"s":260,"text":"修罗场","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%BF%AE%E7%BD%97%E5%9C%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231773989539885958FC%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227481098604116280126%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227448296901490773017%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%BF%AE%E7%BD%97%E5%9C%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":276,"s":272,"text":"娱乐春秋","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A8%B1%E4%B9%90%E6%98%A5%E7%A7%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231773989539885958FC%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227481098604116280126%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227448296901490773017%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A8%B1%E4%B9%90%E6%98%A5%E7%A7%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1741833764,"group_id":"7448296901490773017","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5EFarkvycfDHVoT2YdVl9DNWgH686T/S2MUOqzv4xta","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2333576361946829","user_name":"黑雾岛的七绪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2333576361946829","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7448296901490773017","book_info":{"abstract":"【群像】+【搞笑】+【日常】+【多女主】+【太平道】
穿越十年，顾诚在太平观带娃，平安无事。
直到小师妹梦见他竟然被桃花埋葬。
然后捡到失明的笨蛋戏精公主。
被失忆的三无白给杀手缠上。
一拳打碎天赋异禀的少女武道梦，令剑心破碎的天才大师姐再度拿剑……
“好麻烦啊！”
顾诚仰天长啸，一不小心，惊动九天雷霆。
承黄天道统，继太平遗志。
这破碎的世道终该蜕变！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2ocd1c6ae8c3748b3e95335c3d06f9131d~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"如临深渊兮","author_id":"","book_id":"7448296901490773017","book_name":"师兄啊师兄，你命犯桃花","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#403038","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":258,"name":"传统玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258&name=传统玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7471234334637179417","read_count":"35441","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"349054"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"158","tags":"传统玄幻,玄幻,搞笑轻松,多女主,穿越,天才","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/eb5ae17487994d9d13b2b059b3974f0a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779173539&x-signature=vSyN04tSBQtxpXxj81sHAilnGI0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3699177115353421","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"17"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320145218252AF553E41E885958FC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_coun
